allow: Bash(echo "--- existing python images ---"; docker images | grep -i python || echo "\(none\)"; echo "--- docker config ---"; cat ~/.docker/config.json 2>/dev/null || echo "\(no config\)")

Bash(echo "=== credsStore 설정 ==="; grep credsStore ~/.docker/config.json; echo "=== docker-credential-desktop 위치 탐색 ==="; ls -la /Applications/Docker.app/Contents/Resources/bin/docker-credential-desktop 2>/dev/null && echo "FOUND in Docker.app" || echo "not in Docker.app default path"; which docker-credential-desktop 2>/dev/null || echo "not in PATH"; echo "=== docker 바이너리 위치 ==="; which docker)

Bash(python3 -m py_compile back/main.py back/models.py back/storage.py front/app.py)
